inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Rash can occur in viral fevers, but bleeding gums are more specific to Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria does not typically cause rash or bleeding gums

inputs.text: Main abhi bhi bahut kamzor hoon, pet mein dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Malaria
